gist.headline: Fresh off the press
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot just dropped the latest news and community apps right into our README.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest project news and recently added community apps.
gist.impact: Visitors to the GitHub repository will see the most up-to-date community highlights and project announcements.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee acting as a paperboy or reading a fresh newspaper. A cute robot (representing the automated bot) handing a newspaper to the bee.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head handing a freshly printed pixelated newspaper to the tiny bee mascot. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head handing a freshly printed pixelated newspaper to the tiny bee mascot.
